output.code:
with open('/mnt/data/file-FMd1ntiay9Q1ReFtdWimXz-text_to_analyse.txt','r',encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
print(text)

quotes = [(m.start(), m.end()) for m in re.finditer('"', text)]
quotes[:20], len(quotes)

segments=[]
quote_positions = quotes
for i in range(0,len(quote_positions)-1,2):
    start = quote_positions[i][1]
    end = quote_positions[i+1][0]
    segments.append((start,end,text[start:end]))
segments

def trim_span(s, start_idx, end_idx):
    # Remove whitespace and punctuation characters at edges
    import re, string
    punct = set(list(' \n\t\r\u200f\u200e"«»"\'“”‘’()[]{}<>،.:؛!?…'))
    # Additional Arabic punctuation includes '٫','٬','ـ'
    while start_idx < end_idx and text[start_idx] in punct:
        start_idx += 1
    while end_idx > start_idx and text[end_idx-1] in punct:
        end_idx -= 1
    return start_idx,end_idx

# for first segment
start=735
end=882
start,end=trim_span(text,start,end)
text[start:end]

ayah_spans=[]
for m in re.finditer(r'\{([^}]*)\}', text):
    ayah_text=m.group(1)
    start=m.start(1)
    end=m.end(1)
    # trim
    start,end=trim_span(text,start,end)
    ayah_spans.append((start,end,text[start:end]))
ayah_spans

hadith_spans=[]
for start_orig,end_orig,_ in segments:
    start,end = trim_span(text,start_orig,end_orig)
    hadith_spans.append((start,end,text[start:end]))
hadith_spans

spans=[]
for start,end,text_span in ayah_spans:
    spans.append({"span_start":start,"span_end":end,"span_text":text_span,"citation_type":"Aya"})
for start,end,text_span in hadith_spans:
    spans.append({"span_start":start,"span_end":end,"span_text":text_span,"citation_type":"Hadith"})
# sort by start
spans_sorted=sorted(spans, key=lambda x:x["span_start"])
spans_sorted
